positive: A vibrant, stylized watercolor illustration of a woodland forest scene at sunrise. The composition features silhouetted outlines of deer, birch trees, and meandering stream banks in the foreground. The color palette is dominated by warm gold, sapphire blue, and emerald green, with soft gradients defining the sky and foliage. Focus on clean, bold lines and a strong contrast between the deep, cool shadows and the bright, glowing sunrise light. The style should emulate modern botanical and nature-themed graphic prints suitable for t-shirts. Minimalistic, highly detailed, high contrast, clean silhouette art, central composition, volumetric lighting, vector graphic style, on a transparent background concept.
negative: blur, noisy, low resolution, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poorly drawn, grayscale, sketch, photorealistic, 3d render, messy, crowded background
